description: Named Phase 2 tuning profiles and candidate knob groups after baseline numbers exist.

tensorrt_llm.reason: Blocked on the current RunPod A100 80GB PCIe Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct benchmark path because compatible TensorRT-LLM runtime and model support are not reliably available on the host pool.

profiles.name: baseline_conservative
profiles.description: Phase 1 conservative baseline with no Phase 2 overrides.

profiles.name: prefill_batching_4096
profiles.description: Raise batched prefill tokens to 4096 to test higher prefill packing without the most aggressive queue size.

profiles.name: prefill_batching_8192
profiles.description: Push batched prefill tokens to 8192 to see if throughput improves before TTFT regresses materially.

profiles.name: concurrency_32
profiles.description: Cap active sequences at 32 to test whether queueing and fragmentation improve versus the baseline.

profiles.name: concurrency_48
profiles.description: Raise active sequences to 48 to probe higher steady-state throughput at the same external concurrency.

profiles.name: scheduler_steps_2
profiles.description: Enable a small number of scheduler steps to reduce overhead without committing to an aggressive scheduling policy.

profiles.name: scheduler_steps_4
profiles.description: Increase scheduler steps to 4 to test whether batching efficiency improves enough to offset extra per-step work.

profiles.name: baseline_conservative
profiles.description: Phase 1 conservative baseline with no Phase 2 overrides.

profiles.name: chunked_prefill_2048
profiles.description: Set chunked prefill to 2048 to reduce long-prefill bursts and observe TTFT stability.

profiles.name: chunked_prefill_4096
profiles.description: Set chunked prefill to 4096 to test a middle ground between latency smoothing and prefill efficiency.

profiles.name: running_requests_32
profiles.description: Limit concurrently running requests to 32 to see whether tail latency improves at the same outer concurrency.

profiles.name: running_requests_48
profiles.description: Allow 48 running requests to probe higher throughput while watching for capacity pressure.

profiles.name: memory_fraction_085
profiles.description: Reduce static memory fraction to 0.85 to recover headroom and watch whether throughput suffers.

profiles.name: memory_fraction_094
profiles.description: Raise static memory fraction to 0.94 to test whether higher utilization improves throughput without destabilizing the worker.
